description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a minimalist, modern design, featuring a smooth, unadorned upper and a rounded toe. The shoe is equipped with a standard criss-cross lacing system, using six pairs of eyelets and flat laces. The sole is thick and slightly raised, providing cushioning and support, and the heel is gently curved for comfort. The collar is moderately padded, and the tongue is integrated seamlessly into the upper. The shoe is entirely monochromatic, with no visible branding, logos, or decorative elements. The overall appearance is clean, streamlined, and versatile, suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A minimalist, low-top sneaker with a smooth, unadorned upper and standard criss-cross laces. The shoe is monochromatic and features a thick, supportive sole.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth upper, rounded toe, and standard lacing with six eyelets.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical lacing and rounded toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the clean lines and minimal detailing of the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the gently curved heel and seamless back panel.
